message:
feat: Add core modules and fix build issues across workspace

New modules:
- ftui-core/logging: Tracing macro support with feature-gated no-ops
- ftui-render/ansi: ANSI escape sequence primitives
- ftui-render/budget: Render budget management
- ftui-text/segment,text,width_cache,wrap: Text processing pipeline
- ftui-extras/clipboard,image: Terminal clipboard and image support
- ftui-runtime/terminal_writer: Output writer abstraction

Key fixes:
- Add KeyEventKind import and parse_kitty_keyboard to input_parser
- Gate tracing macros behind feature flags in presenter
- Add tracing as optional dependency in ftui-render
- Update cursor tracking to use Option<u16> for unknown state
- Re-export tracing macros from ftui-core lib.rs

All core crates (ftui-core, ftui-render, ftui-style, ftui-text) now
build and test successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,10 +4,21 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
 publish = false
 
+[features]
+default = []
+# Enable structured logging with tracing
+tracing = ["dep:tracing"]
+# Enable JSON output for production logging
+tracing-json = ["tracing", "dep:tracing-subscriber"]
+
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 crossterm = "0.28"
 
+# Optional tracing support
+tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["json", "env-filter"], optional = true }
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 # For spike PTY tests
 portable-pty = "0.8"

@@ -7,12 +7,13 @@ publish = false
 [features]
 default = []
 # Enable performance tracing spans
-tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing"]
+tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing", "dep:tracing"]
 
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core" }
+tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
 # Note: ftui-render is the core kernel and should not depend on ftui-style.
 # ftui-style depends on ftui-render (not vice versa).
 # ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }  # TODO: Add when needed

@@ -1 +1,14 @@
 #![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+//! FrankenTUI Runtime
+//!
+//! This crate provides the runtime components that tie together the core,
+//! render, and layout crates into a complete terminal application framework.
+//!
+//! # Key Components
+//!
+//! - [`TerminalWriter`] - Unified terminal output coordinator with inline mode support
+
+pub mod terminal_writer;
+
+pub use terminal_writer::{ScreenMode, TerminalWriter, UiAnchor};

@@ -4,13 +4,19 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
 publish = false
 
+[features]
+default = []
+thread_local_cache = []
+
 [dependencies]
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }
 ftui-style = { path = "../ftui-style" }
 unicode-width = "0.2"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.11"
 smallvec = "1.13"
 tracing = "0.1"
+lru = "0.12"
+rustc-hash = "2"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1"
